note.FR: Chainbreak Pinion - arme signature (Epee, v1.4). Augmente la Morale et accorde des buffs de degats par Combo Point. Meilleure arme melee de Flora.
note.EN: Chainbreak Pinion - signature weapon (Sword, v1.4). Increases Morale and grants damage buffs per Combo Point. Flora's best melee weapon.

note.FR: Aureate Yore - CRIT DMG +125%, les Sliding Attacks gagnent +150% CRIT Chance. Solide alternative a la signature.
note.EN: Aureate Yore - CRIT DMG +125%, Sliding Attacks gain +150% CRIT Chance. Solid alternative to the signature.

note.FR: Momiji Itteki - CRIT DMG +125%, Degats infliges +18% plus +18% par Combo Level. Bonne seconde alternative.
note.EN: Momiji Itteki - CRIT DMG +125%, Damage Dealt +18% plus +18% per Combo Level. Solid second alternative.

note.FR: Thorned Requiem - arme de Calamite (Mitrailleuse, v1.4). Bonus de Skill Intensity et de Degats Umbro. Meilleure arme distance de Flora.
note.EN: Thorned Requiem - Calamity weapon (Machinegun, v1.4). Skill Intensity and Umbro DMG bonuses. Flora's best ranged weapon.

note.FR: Rendhusk - Character ATK +120%. Le buff ATK personnage amplifie les degats critiques de Flora. Bonne alternative distance.
note.EN: Rendhusk - Character ATK +120%. Character ATK buff inflates Flora's crit damage. Solid ranged alternative.

affinity.FR: Volonte du Serpent a Plumes - Morale

note.FR:
Focus Morale + Degats Critiques + Degats Umbro + ATK. Tolerance cible 148/100. 5 modules de Track-Shift requis.

Ajustements d'affinite : Slot 1 Crescent, Slot 2 Triangle, Slot 3 Ellipse, Slot 4 Diamond, Slot 5 aucun, Slot 6 Triangle, Slot 7 aucun, Slot 8 aucun.

Affinity centrale : Feathered Serpent's Morale (mods-51716, r5 Umbro). +5 augmente la Tolerance maximale.
note.EN:
Focus Morale + CRIT DMG + Umbro DMG + ATK. Target Tolerance 148/100. 5 Track-Shift modules required.

Track adjustments: Slot 1 Crescent, Slot 2 Triangle, Slot 3 Ellipse, Slot 4 Diamond, Slot 5 none, Slot 6 Triangle, Slot 7 none, Slot 8 none.

Central affinity: Feathered Serpent's Morale (mods-51716, r5 Umbro). +5 increases max Tolerance.

note.FR: Phoxhunter (Umbro) - amplifie les degats Umbro et Weapon DMG de l'equipe. Equipez-le ideralement avec Siren's Wings Inspo Rage pour un boost CRIT DMG supplementaire a Flora.
note.EN: Phoxhunter (Umbro) - amplifies team Umbro and Weapon DMG. Ideally equip with Siren's Wings Inspo Rage for an additional CRIT DMG boost to Flora.

note.FR: Fina - fournit buffs de DMG, Penetration et DMG elementaire a l'equipe. Synergie directe avec le kit Weapon DMG de Flora.
note.EN: Fina - provides DMG buffs, Penetration and elemental DMG to the team. Direct synergy with Flora's Weapon DMG kit.

note.FR: Capacite AoE - source principale de degats. A monter en priorite absolue.
note.EN: AoE ability - primary damage source. Top priority to upgrade.

note.FR: Etat ultime - cœur du kit de Flora ('bread and butter'). A monter en parallele de Petal Pirouette.
note.EN: Ultimate state - core of Flora's kit ('bread and butter'). Upgrade in parallel with Petal Pirouette.

note.FR: Passif qui debloque les Charged Attacks et les debuffs ennemis. A monter apres les deux skills principales.
note.EN: Passive that unlocks Charged Attacks and enemy debuffs. Upgrade after the two main skills.

notes.FR:
Flora est la premiere personnage centree sur les Degats d'Arme dont les competences scalent avec le Weapon DMG (et non Skill Intensity comme la majorite des DPS). Elle inflige enormement de degats critiques et d'arme, beneficie d'une mobilite correcte et tire parti des meilleurs Demon Wedges et supports.

Mecanique cœur : empilement de Symphony, Reprise et Thorns pour maximiser les degats scaled-on-weapon. Quand un coup critique passe, l'ennemi devient une 'Marionnette de Cour' (incapable d'agir).

Intron priority (ordre d'unlock) :
- I2 (★★★★★) : double les stacks de Reprise + reduit le CD de Waltz
- I6 (★★★★★) : +30% PEN actif, le Finale convertit les stacks de Reprise, declenche Waltz 5 fois
- I1 (★★★★☆) : +5 stacks Symphony, 75% CRIT Rate
- I4 (★★★☆☆) : gains de Lucidite/Combo Points depuis Entranced

Forces : enormes degats CRIT et Weapon DMG, mobilite decente, beneficie des meilleurs supports.
Faiblesses : aucune capacite defensive en dehors de l'immunite au hitstun. Besoin d'armes top-tier pour fonctionner pleinement.

Armes v1.4 desormais integrees : Chainbreak Pinion (signature melee, Epee) en BiS mele, Thorned Requiem (Calamite, Mitrailleuse) en BiS distance, centre Feathered Serpent's Morale.
notes.EN:
Flora is the first character whose skills damage scales with Weapon DMG (not Skill Intensity like most DPS). She deals huge crit and weapon damage, has decent mobility, and benefits from top-tier Demon Wedges and supports.

Core mechanic: stacking Symphony, Reprise, and Thorns to maximize weapon-scaled damage. When CRIT lands, enemies become 'Courtly Marionettes' (unable to act).

Intron priority (unlock order):
- I2 (★★★★★): doubles Reprise stacks + reduces Waltz cooldown
- I6 (★★★★★): +30% PEN when active, Finale converts Reprise stacks, triggers Waltz 5 times
- I1 (★★★★☆): +5 Symphony stacks, 75% CRIT Rate
- I4 (★★★☆☆): Sanity/Combo Point gains from Entranced

Strengths: huge CRIT and Weapon DMG, decent mobility, scales with top-tier supports.
Weaknesses: no defensive abilities outside of hitstun immunity. Needs built top-tier weapons to function effectively.

v1.4 weapons now integrated: Chainbreak Pinion (signature melee, Sword) as BiS melee, Thorned Requiem (Calamity, Machinegun) as BiS ranged, central Feathered Serpent's Morale.
